title: citronella smythii
intro: Citronella smythii, also known as Java citronella, is a perennial grass native to Indonesia, belonging to the family Cymbopogon. This plant contains citronellal, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of citronella smythii include reducing fever, relieving headache and nausea, and acting as an antiseptic, making it useful in wound healing and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of citronella smythii include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
